arts.ttl: Arsenal closer to Gyokeres signing as Man Utd pull out
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has moved a step closer to joining Arsenal this summer after Man Utd pulled out of the race for the Sweden star. Correio da Manha reports that Berta played a "decisive role" in the convincing Gyokeres to join Arsenal over multiple other top European clubs such as Man Utd, Barcelona, Chelsea and Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Can you name the teams last time Arsenal faced Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Arsenal have not come up against Real Madrid for almost a decade. Can you name the starting XI's from last time they faced each other?

arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Arsenal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the trip to England to take on Arsenal in the Champions League quarter-finals tonight. The holders head to North London aiming to secure a positive first-leg result. Carlo Ancelotti’s side are aiming to defend the trophy and reach the semi-finals for the fifth straight season. arts.ttl: Ancelotti’s major selection dilemma ahead of Real Madrid’s UCL opener against Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti must decide where to field Federico Valverde at the Emirates Stadium today, as the tournament holders take on Arsenal in the first leg of the Champions League quarter-finals. It is thought likelier that the Uruguayan will play in Madrid’s midfield in North London - with Lucas Vázquez given the nod on the right of defense - but Ancelotti said yesterday that he was still to reach a final decision .

arts.ttl: “They f****d that one up” – Man Utd legend says he urged them to sign Arsenal star
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Rio Ferdinand has slammed his former club for failing to take his advice to make a move for Declan Rice before he joined Arsenal. arts.ttl: Williams fires clear message as Arsenal target Leao as transfer alternative
arts.sum: With all of that being said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Arsenal transfer news and rumours. Links to Rafael Leao of AC Milan as a potential alternative have emerged with it possible the Italian giants look to cash in after a disappointing 2025/26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Why Odegaard fell short at Real & thrived at Arsenal
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard arrived at Real Madrid as the wonderkid everyone wanted, but he left more than five years later having made just 11 appearances.
